description: Page through Plaud recordings with optional filters.

after.description: Cursor from next_after of a previous response

folder.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); pass empty string for unfiled recordings

name: browse_recordings

description: Fetch full detail for one recording.

include.description: Large fields to include: transcript, speakers, summary

name: get_recording

description: Apply a state change to a recording: rename, trash, restore, delete, move, or rename_speaker.

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); required for move; use '-' to clear

original_label.description: Required for rename_speaker: existing speaker label

name: mutate_recording

description: Upload a local audio file to Plaud.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`) to assign after upload

start_time.description: Millisecond epoch integer or ISO 8601 string; defaults to now

timezone_offset.description: UTC offset in hours; defaults to local system offset

title.description: Recording title; defaults to file stem

name: upload_recording

description: List Plaud folders, returning id, name, color, and icon for each.
name: list_folders

description: Trigger transcription and summarization for a recording; the `wait` mode controls how long to block (default: transcript).

language.description: BCP-47 primary subtag (e.g. 'en', 'zh'); use 'auto' to detect

wait.description: How long to block after the transcribe/summarize request is accepted: 'none' returns immediately with {recording_id, accepted}, 'transcript' waits only for transcript readiness, and 'summary' waits for both transcript and summary.

name: process_recording

description: Merge two or more recordings into a single new recording, blocking until the merge job completes.
name: merge_recordings
